classes.name: openfisca_tools.data.private.PrivateDataset

methods.name: openfisca_tools.data.private.PrivateDataset.download
documentation:
Downloads the dataset from Google Cloud Storage for the given year. Overwrites any existing dataset for the year specified.

Args:
    year (int): The year of the dataset to download.

Raises:
    FileNotFoundError: If the dataset could not be found on Google Cloud Storage.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.data.private.PrivateDataset.upload
documentation:
Uploads the dataset to Google Cloud Storage for the given year.

Args:
    year (int): The year of the dataset to upload.
Private datasets are stored on Google Cloud Buckets.

classes.name: openfisca_tools.data.public.PublicDataset

methods.name: openfisca_tools.data.public.PublicDataset.download
documentation:
Downloads the dataset from the given URL for the given year.

Args:
    year (int): The year of the dataset to download.
Datasets inheriting from this class are stored on publicly accessible URLs.

modules.name: openfisca_tools.hypothetical
documentation: IndividualSim and any other interfaces to intialising and running simulations on hypothetical situations.

classes.name: openfisca_tools.hypothetical.IndividualSim

methods.name: openfisca_tools.hypothetical.IndividualSim.__init__
documentation:
Initialises a hypothetical simulation.

Args:
    reform (ReformType, optional): The reform to apply. Defaults to ().
    year (int, optional): The default year input. Defaults to 2022.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.hypothetical.IndividualSim.apply_reform
documentation:
Recursively applies a reform to the tax-benefit system.

Args:
    reform (ReformType): The reform to apply to the tax-benefit system.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.hypothetical.IndividualSim.add_data
documentation:
Add an entity to the situation data.

Args:
    entity (str, optional): The entity name. Defaults to "person".
    name (str, optional): The name of the entity instance. Defaults to None.
    input_period (str, optional): The input period for the values. Defaults to None.
    auto_period (str, optional): Whether to automatically repeat inputs onto subperiods. Defaults to True.
    kwargs (dict): A dictionary of (variable, value).

methods.name: openfisca_tools.hypothetical.IndividualSim.get_entity
documentation:
Gets the entity type of the entity with a given name.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the entity.

Returns:
    Entity: The type of the entity.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.hypothetical.IndividualSim.map_to
documentation:
Maps values from one entity to another.

Args:
    arr (np.array): The values in their original position.
    entity (str): The source entity.
    target_entity (str): The target entity.
    how (str, optional): A function to use when mapping. Defaults to None.

Raises:
    ValueError: If an invalid (dis)aggregation function is passed.

Returns:
    np.array: The mapped values.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.hypothetical.IndividualSim.get_group
documentation:
Gets the name of the containing entity for a named entity and group type.

Args:
    entity (str): The group type, e.g. "household".
    name (str): The name of the entity, e.g. "person1".

Returns:
    str: The containing entity, e.g. "household1".

methods.name: openfisca_tools.hypothetical.IndividualSim.calc
documentation:
Calculates the value of a variable, executing any required formulas.

Args:
    var (str): The variable to calculate.
    period (int, optional): The time period to calculate for. Defaults to None.
    target (str, optional): The target entity if not all entities are required. Defaults to None.
    index (int, optional): The numerical index of the target entity. Defaults to None.
    reform (reform, optional): The reform to apply. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    np.array: The resulting values.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.hypothetical.IndividualSim.deriv
documentation:
Calculates the derivative of one variable with respect to another.

Args:
    var (str): The target variable.
    wrt (str, optional): The varying variable. Defaults to "employment_income".
    period (int, optional): The time period to calculate over. Defaults to None.
    var_target (str, optional): The target name. Defaults to None.
    wrt_target (str, optional): The source name. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    np.array: The derivatives as the source variable varies.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.hypothetical.IndividualSim.reset_vary
documentation: Removes an axis from the simulation.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.hypothetical.IndividualSim.vary
documentation:
Adds an axis to the situation, varying one variable.

Args:
    var (str, optional): The variable to change.
    parameter (str, optional): The parameter to vary. Defaults to None.
    min (float, optional): The minimum value. Defaults to 0.
    max (float, optional): The maximum value. Defaults to 200000.
    step (float, optional): The step size. Defaults to 100.
    index (int, optional): The specific entity index to target. Defaults to 0.
    period (int, optional): The time period. Defaults to None.

The IndividualSim class creates a simulation of tax-benefit policy
on individually-specified entities.

classes.name: openfisca_tools.data.dataset.Dataset

methods.name: openfisca_tools.data.dataset.Dataset.filename
documentation:
Returns the filename of the dataset for a given year.

Args:
    year (int): The year of the dataset to generate.

Returns:
    str: The filename of the dataset.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.data.dataset.Dataset.file
documentation:
Returns the path to the dataset for a given year.

Args:
    year (int): The year of the dataset to generate.

Returns:
    Path: The path to the dataset.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.data.dataset.Dataset.load
documentation:
Loads the dataset for a given year, returning a H5 file reader. You can then access the
dataset like a dictionary (e.g.e Dataset.load(2022)["variable"]).

Args:
    year (int): The year of the dataset to load.
    key (str, optional): The key to load. Defaults to None.
    mode (str, optional): The mode to open the file with. Defaults to "r".

Returns:
    Union[h5py.File, np.array, pd.DataFrame, pd.HDFStore]: The dataset.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.data.dataset.Dataset.save
documentation:
Overwrites the values for `key` with `values`.

Args:
    year (int): The year of the dataset to save.
    key (str): The key to save.
    values (Union[np.array, pd.DataFrame]): The values to save.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.data.dataset.Dataset.keys
documentation:
Returns the keys of the dataset for a given year.

Args:
    year (int): The year of the dataset to generate.

Returns:
    list: The keys of the dataset.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.data.dataset.Dataset.generate
documentation:
Generates the dataset for a given year (all datasets should implement this method).

Args:
    year (int): The year of the dataset to generate.

Raises:
    NotImplementedError: If the function has not been overriden.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.data.dataset.Dataset.download
documentation:
Downloads the dataset for a given year (all datasets should implement this method).

Args:
    year (int): The year of the dataset to download.

Raises:
    NotImplementedError: If the function has not been overriden.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.data.dataset.Dataset.upload
documentation:
Uploads the dataset for a given year (all datasets should implement this method).

Args:
    year (int): The year of the dataset to upload.

Raises:
    NotImplementedError: If the function has not been overriden.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.data.dataset.Dataset.remove
documentation:
Removes the dataset file for a given year.

Args:
    year (int, optional): The year of the dataset to remove. Defaults to all.

The `Dataset` class is a base class for datasets used directly or indirectly for OpenFisca models.
A dataset defines a generation function to create it from other data, and this class provides common features
like cloud storage, metadata and loading.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.model_api.index_.index_
documentation:
Indexes into a object, but only when a condition is true. This improves
performance over `np.where`, which will index all values and then filter the result.

Args:
    into (Parameter): The parameter to index into.
    indices (Union[ArrayLike, List[ArrayLike]]): The full, un-filtered index array. Can be a list of arrays
        for sequential indexing.
    where (ArrayLike): A filter for indexing.
    fill (float, optional): The value to fill where `index_where` is False. Defaults to 0.

Returns:
    ArrayLike: The indexed result.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.model_api.model_api.for_each_variable
documentation:
Applies operations to lists of variables.

Args:
    entity (Population): The entity population, as passed in formulas.
    period (Period): The period, as pass in formulas.
    variables (List[str]): A list of variable names.
    agg_func (str, optional): The operation to apply to combine variable results. Defaults to "add".
    group_agg_func (str, optional): The operation to apply to transform values to the target entity level. Defaults to "add".
    options (List[str], optional): Options to pass to the `entity(variable, period)` call. Defaults to None.

Raises:
    ValueError: If any target variable is not at or below the target entity level.

Returns:
    ArrayLike: The result of the operation.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.model_api.model_api.add
documentation:
Sums a list of variables.

Args:
    entity (Population): The entity population, as passed in formulas.
    period (Period): The period, as pass in formulas.
    variables (List[str]): A list of variable names.
    options (List[str], optional): Options to pass to the `entity(variable, period)` call. Defaults to None.

Raises:
    ValueError: If any target variable is not at or below the target entity level.

Returns:
    ArrayLike: The result of the operation.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.model_api.model_api.aggr
documentation:
Sums a list of variables belonging to entity members.

Args:
    entity (Population): The entity population, as passed in formulas.
    period (Period): The period, as pass in formulas.
    variables (List[str]): A list of variable names.
    options (List[str], optional): Options to pass to the `entity(variable, period)` call. Defaults to None.

Raises:
    ValueError: If any target variable is not below the target entity level.

Returns:
    ArrayLike: The result of the operation.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.model_api.model_api.and_
documentation:
Performs a logical and operation on a list of variables.

Args:
    entity (Population): The entity population, as passed in formulas.
    period (Period): The period, as pass in formulas.
    variables (List[str]): A list of variable names.
    options (List[str], optional): Options to pass to the `entity(variable, period)` call. Defaults to None.

Raises:
    ValueError: If any target variable is not at the target entity level.

Returns:
    ArrayLike: The result of the operation.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.model_api.model_api.amount_over
documentation:
Calculates the amounts over a threshold.

Args:
    amount (ArrayLike): The amount to calculate for.
    threshold_1 (float): The threshold.

Returns:
    ArrayLike: The amounts over the threshold.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.model_api.model_api.amount_between
documentation:
Calculates the amounts between two thresholds.

Args:
    amount (ArrayLike): The amount to calculate for.
    threshold_1 (float): The lower threshold.
    threshold_2 (float): The upper threshold.

Returns:
    ArrayLike: The amounts between the thresholds.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.model_api.model_api.is_in
documentation:
Returns true if the value is in the list of targets.

Args:
    values (ArrayLike): The values to test.

Returns:
    ArrayLike: True if the value is in the list of targets.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.model_api.model_api.between
documentation:
Returns true if values are between lower and upper.

Args:
    values (ArrayLike): The input array.
    lower (float): The lower bound.
    upper (float): The upper bound.
    inclusive (bool, optional): Whether to include or exclude the bounds. Defaults to True.

Returns:
    ArrayLike: The resulting array.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.model_api.model_api.uprated
documentation:
Attaches a formula applying an uprating factor to input variables (going back as far as 2015).

Args:
    by (str, optional): The name of the parameter (under parameters.uprating). Defaults to None (no uprating applied).

Returns:
    Callable: A class decorator.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.model_api.model_api.sum_of_variables
documentation:
Returns a function that sums the values of a list of variables.

Args:
    variables (Union[List[str], str]): A list of variable names.

Returns:
    Callable: A function that sums the values of the variables.

modules.name: openfisca_tools.microsimulation
documentation: Microsimulation interfaces and utility functions.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.microsimulation.Microsimulation.__init__
documentation:
Initialises a microsimulation.

Args:
    reform (ReformType): The reform to apply. Can be a tuple of OpenFisca Reforms.
    dataset (type, optional): The dataset to use.
    year (int, optional): The year of the dataset to load. Defaults to 2020.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.microsimulation.Microsimulation.apply_reform
documentation:
Recursively applies a reform to the tax-benefit system.

Args:
    reform (ReformType): The reform to apply to the tax-benefit system.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.microsimulation.Microsimulation.load_dataset
documentation:
Loads the dataset with the specified year.

Args:
    dataset (type): The dataset to use.
    year (int): The year of the data to load.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.microsimulation.Microsimulation.map_to
documentation:
Maps values from one entity to another.

Args:
    arr (np.array): The values in their original position.
    entity (str): The source entity.
    target_entity (str): The target entity.
    how (str, optional): A function to use when mapping. Defaults to None.

Raises:
    ValueError: If an invalid (dis)aggregation function is passed.

Returns:
    np.array: The mapped values.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.microsimulation.Microsimulation.calc
documentation:
Calculates the values of a variable, executing any formulas required.

Args:
    variable (str): The name of the variable.
    map_to (str, optional): The entity to map to. Defaults to None (the original entity).
    how (str, optional): The (dis)aggregation function to use when mapping. Defaults to None.
    period (int, optional): The time period to calculate for. Defaults to 2020.
    weighted (bool, optional): Whether to return weighted results. Defaults to True.

Returns:
    Union[np.array, MicroSeries]: A weighted or unweighted array.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.microsimulation.Microsimulation.df
documentation:
Constructs a DataFrame of multiple variables.

Args:
    variables (List[str]): The variables to include in the DataFrame.
    period (int, optional): The time period to calculate for. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    MicroDataFrame: The weighted DataFrame.

methods.name: openfisca_tools.microsimulation.Microsimulation.deriv
documentation:
Calculates the derivative of one variable with respect to another.

Args:
    target (str): The target variable.
    wrt (str): The source variable.
    delta (float, optional): The amount to increase the source by. Defaults to 100.
    percent (bool, optional): Whether the delta is relative to the original value or absolute. Defaults to False.
    group_limit (int, optional): The maximum number of people in a group to calculate derivatives for. Defaults to 5.

Raises:
    ValueError: If source variable is upstream of the target variable.

Returns:
    MicroSeries: The weighted derivatives.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.model_api.use_current_parameters.use_current_parameters
documentation:
Backdates parameters at a given instant to the start of the year.

Args:
    date (str, optional): The given instant. Defaults to now.

Returns:
    Reform: The reform backdating parameters.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.parameters.nesting.get_breakdown_variables
documentation: Returns the list of variables that are used to break down the parameter.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.parameters.propagation.propagate_parameter_metadata
documentation:
Passes parameter metadata to descendents where this is specified.

Breakdown metadata is ignored.

Args:
    root (ParameterNode): The root node.

Returns:
    ParameterNode: The edited parameter root.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.parameters.uprating.uprate_parameters
documentation:
Uprates parameters according to their metadata.

Args:
    root (ParameterNode): The root of the parameter tree.

Returns:
    ParameterNode: The same root, with uprating applied to descendants.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.parameters.interpolation.interpolate_parameters
documentation:
Interpolates parameters according to their metadata.

Args:
    root (ParameterNode): The root of the parameter tree.

Returns:
    ParameterNode: The same root, with interpolation applied to descendants.

modules.name: openfisca_tools.reforms
documentation: Utility functions for writing reforms.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.reforms.restructure
documentation:
Generates a structural reform.

Args:
    variable (Type[Variable]): The class definition of a variable to replace.

Returns:
    Reform: The reform object.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.reforms.get_parameter
documentation:
Gets a parameter from the tree.

Args:
    root (ParameterNode): The root of the parameter tree.
    parameter (str): The name of the parameter to get.

Returns:
    Parameter: The parameter.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.reforms.set_parameter
documentation:
Generates a parametric reform.

Args:
    parameter (str): The name of the parameter, e.g. tax.income_tax.rate.
    value (float): The value to set as the parameter value.
    period (str): The time period to set it for. Defaults to a ten-year period from 2015 to 2025.

Returns:
    Reform: The reform object.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.reforms.add_parameter_file
documentation:
Generates a reform adding a parameter file to the tree.

Args:
    path (str): The path to the parameter YAML file.

Returns:
    Reform: The Reform adding the parameters.

functions.name: openfisca_tools.reforms.use_current_parameters
documentation:
Backdates parameters at a given instant to the start of the year.

Args:
    date (str, optional): The given instant. Defaults to CURRENT_INSTANT.

Returns:
    Reform: The reform backdating parameters.
